steps.t: Minas Morgul nestles among the mountains in Imlad Morgul. You should patrol the outer wall of the Dead City.
Damrod can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Damrod.
The entrance to Barad Angarth can be found at the base of the outer wall of Minas Morgul. You should enter the tower of Barad Angarth.
Damrod can be found at Barad Angarth. You should talk to Damrod.
